purpose: Prove the complete buyer-visible login-before-payment and cart-continuity behavior in a real browser without live providers.
success_outcome: Google/VK provider-double flows establish session, merge cart, enforce checkout gate, recover safely, and log out without credential or PII leakage.
anti_goals: Do not use live provider accounts or production data.
Do not alter backend auth/cart behavior from acceptance code.
Do not implement checkout fields, orders, inventory, or payments.

success_checks: Both provider-double paths establish real session and customer state.
Cart merge precedes checkout; conflict blocks and retry recovers.
evidence_required: Playwright trace/report for both providers and checkout gate.
Artifact privacy scan, regression/build, T3 human checkpoint, and recovery note.

stop_conditions: E2E cannot use real Medusa/PostgreSQL and browser boundaries.
Provider double bypasses the production callback/session path.
Artifacts cannot be produced without exposing secrets, tokens, session IDs, or PII.
required_handoff: Report changed_files, commands_run, evidence, scope_compliance, and blockers_or_none.
Run /verify and /red-verify; record HUMAN_CHECKPOINT and ROLLBACK_RECOVERY_NOTE before T3 closure.
